result: same-session proof captured; no product code change required

steps.observed: The shipped status bar explicitly reported `transcript: live bottom` before leaving the bottom.
After `PageUp`, the transcript stayed off-bottom and showed both the inline indicator (`▼ 11 newer lines below — l to jump live...`) and status-bar state `transcript: 11 newer below`.
While still off-bottom, sending another prompt appended newer activity in the same session; the transcript remained anchored away from bottom and the status bar showed `transcript: 66 newer below`.
Using the shipped `l` follow-live control immediately removed the `▼ ... newer lines below` indicator and returned the status bar to `transcript: live bottom` in the same session.
After the in-flight turn settled, the shell remained at `transcript: live bottom` with no newer-activity indicator, confirming the cleared state is stable.
